title: Login form shows 'undefined' error on empty email submit
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. Navigate to /login
2. Leave the email field empty
3. Click 'Sign In'
4. Error message displays 'undefined' instead of a helpful validation message

Expected: 'Email is required' validation message
Actual: 'undefined' shown below the email field
acceptance_criteria: Empty email shows 'Email is required' validation message
Invalid email format shows 'Please enter a valid email address'
generated_acceptance_criteria: Validation message clears when user starts typing
Submit button is not disabled — validation happens on submit

test_scenarios.name: shows_required_message_on_empty_email
test_scenarios.description: Submitting form with empty email shows 'Email is required'

test_scenarios.name: shows_format_message_on_invalid_email
test_scenarios.description: Submitting form with 'notanemail' shows format error

test_scenarios.name: validation_clears_on_input
test_scenarios.description: Error message disappears when user types in the email field

edge_cases: Email with only whitespace should be treated as empty
Email with leading/trailing spaces should be trimmed before validation
analyst_notes: Likely a missing validation rule in the form schema. Check if using Zod or Yup for validation.
